ageRatingNotes: No diagnosis, cure, treatment, or prescription claims
Health report uploads and wellness education only
reviewNotes: CareWise AI explains uploaded health reports in simple language for education and visit preparation.
CareWise AI is not a medical diagnosis tool and does not provide emergency care.
Users can request data deletion in the mobile Legal screen and through the public data deletion page.
Test accounts used for review should not include real protected health information.

screenshotChecklist.name: Home
screenshotChecklist.mustShow: Simple CareWise AI purpose and non-diagnostic positioning

screenshotChecklist.name: Report upload
screenshotChecklist.mustShow: PDF/image/text upload with safe explanation wording

screenshotChecklist.name: Report result
screenshotChecklist.mustShow: Risk/status and clinician-review language, not diagnosis

screenshotChecklist.name: Lab trends
screenshotChecklist.mustShow: Saved lab values and clinician interpretation reminder

screenshotChecklist.name: Legal
screenshotChecklist.mustShow: Privacy policy, disclaimer, export summary, and deletion request controls

submissionBlockers: Do not submit before legal review of privacy policy, terms, medical disclaimer, and deletion workflow.
Do not submit before clinician review of high-risk wording.
Do not submit if backend storage is not private.
Do not submit if Apple App Privacy or Google Play Data Safety answers do not match production behavior.
